faithful_note: RNG is FULLY DECODED + deterministic (LCG a=4096 c=150889 m=714025 + Bays-Durham shuffle NTAB=101, seed=randomSeed+0x232323+trunc(frame*1000); earthquake.ts implements it exactly). NOT fundamentally stochastic. The authored transition scores 23.62 on the gate and matches headless 23.55 dB at t=0.25. The divergence at t=0.5/0.75 (12.4/9.96 dB) is the RNG FRAME-INDEX: frameScaled=trunc(ctx.time*30*1000), but if ctx.time is not frame-quantized exactly as FCP quantizes secs=frameN/fps, the RNG picks a different shake POSE (means match ~98 vs 92, but the shake DIRECTION differs). TRACTABLE: align the frame-index to FCP frame-quantized time. The randomseed sweep divergence (16.25) is the same frame-index issue at a changed seed. NOT a fundamental limit — a frame-time-quantization fix. | PROBED 2026-07-18: brute-forced frameScaled by warping the CLEAN (shakes=0) headless base@t=0.5 to match the shaken headless — best at fs=33083 (df=-700 vs engine 33783) = 28.89 dB (vs 26.3 dB clean-base baseline). So the engine frame-index is ~0.7 frame TOO HIGH (ctx.time slightly ahead of FCP secs, or FCP quantizes trunc(frame)*1000 not trunc(frame*1000)). BUT the shake amplitude at t=0.5 is tiny (twist 0.3->rot 0.0023, shake 0.5->tx 3.3px) so the signal is weak; pinning the exact formula needs a LARGER-amplitude probe frame. Methodology proven; the fix is a frame-quantization tweak (trunc(frame)*1000 or a small time offset), low-ROI here since authored already scores 23.62. | FIX ATTEMPTED+REVERTED 2026-07-18: applied trunc(frame)*1000 (frame-quantize first, the principled FCP integer-render-frame form). Isolated clean-base warp probe favored it (24.9/20.6/21.1 vs engine 24.4/19.0/18.2 at t=0.25/0.5/0.75), BUT the GUI gate REGRESSED Movements__Earthquake 23.62->23.25 (-0.37). Another headless-probe != GUI-gate case: the isolated clean-base-warp metric is not the GUI GT truth. Reverted per Rule 2. So even the frame-quantization is GUI-gated; the shipped trunc(frame*1000) is what the GUI GT prefers. The frame-index remains ~sub-frame off vs headless but the gate cannot confirm the headless-faithful form. Effectively blocked by the same headless!=GUI split for the fine pose.
